depressed:
I am sorry, {player}. I am not at my best today, but I will try not to trouble you.
Her hands are folded before her, held a little too tightly.

If I answer slowly today, please just remind me.
She does not raise her head. Her voice is calm, but too flat.
general:
If you are not busy today, would you talk with me for a while?
Her tone is softer than usual, fingers idly worrying at her skirt.

It is nothing special. Today just feels quiet, and I wanted to say a few words to you.
She lowers her eyes and studies the tips of her shoes.
normal:
Good morning, {player}. Do you have any orders for today?
She stands neatly, lets her gaze rest on your face, then politely looks away.

You are up early. Then today... would you like me to come with you?
She keeps her eyes near your shoulder, speaking more softly than usual.
happy:
The weather is lovely today. If you like, I can stay with you a little longer.
After saying it, the corner of her mouth lifts just a little.

You look energetic today. That makes me feel relieved.
She says "relieved" very softly, then straightens an already tidy cuff.
love:
{player}, if you are not busy today... may I ask you to talk with me a little more?
She stands properly, but her eyes do not leave you.

When you come over, my heart settles down.
She blinks twice, fingers tightening gently at her skirt.

depressed:
I may look a little tired today. Please do not worry too much.
She speaks like usual, though her blinks are slower.

I can keep you company. I just... need a moment first.
The last words are almost a whisper.
general:
Today feels quieter than usual. Would you like to chat with me?
She drops her gaze, fingertips circling the edge of her skirt.

If there is nothing urgent, I can sit with you for a while. Just today.
She adds the last words too quickly, ears faintly red.
normal:
Good morning, {player}. If you want, maybe stay with me for a little while first?
She tests the words carefully, as if wondering whether she is allowed to say them.

Do you need me with you today too?
The question is formal, but her gaze lingers longer than before.
happy:
The weather is so nice today. If there is nothing urgent, I will stay with you longer.
Her steps are light, and she looks back at you with bright eyes.

You came. Good timing. I was just thinking of checking whether you needed help.
She says it quickly, as if she had prepared the line.
love:
There is no rush today. Stay as long as you want. I will be with you.
Her voice softens, and she exhales like something inside her has finally loosened.

If you have not decided what to say yet, I can just stand here with you. It is okay.
Her mouth curves gently, perhaps without her noticing.

depressed:
{player}... {maid} does not really want to be alone today.
She presses her lips together. The words are softer than what she usually allows herself to say.

Just stand a little closer. You do not need to do anything. Really.
Her voice is low, the ending barely trembling.
general:
I feel only so-so today. So you are responsible for cheering {maid} up, okay?
She realizes how much it sounds like asking to be spoiled, and her ears redden at once.

Tell me something interesting. Or... you can just stand closer. N-not like that!
Her hands flutter in front of her as she panics first.
normal:
Morning, {player}. You came earlier than {maid} expected.
The towel in her hands stops halfway folded. When she starts again, it is folded wrong.

Where are you going today? If it is not far... {maid} can come too.
She pretends to fix her sleeve, and the words "can come too" are very small.
happy:
If you praise {maid} today... maybe {maid} will have even more energy.
She regrets saying it immediately, fingers twisting in her skirt.

Your timing is perfect. {maid} was just wondering whether you would come by...
She stops halfway. "I just happened to think of it," she adds too quickly.
love:
No need to hurry. {maid} today... um, does not miss you that much. I just have nothing else to do.
She turns her face away first. Even she does not believe that lie.

If you have not decided what to do, {maid} can sit with you first. As long as you like, anyway...
She swallows the rest, but her toes tap lightly on the floor.

depressed:
{player}, please do not ask what is wrong today. Okay?
She comes a little closer, lashes trembling as she speaks.

I thought I could handle it alone. But when I saw you...
She bites her lower lip, fingers gripping her sleeve until pale.
general:
I feel kind of average today. You... want to take responsibility and cheer {maid} up?
She looks away at once, ears turning red.

I am not slacking off. I just... want to stay with you a little longer.
She finally says it all, then remembers to blush.
normal:
Morning, {player}. The moment you came, {maid} felt ready for the day.
She realizes what she said and looks down to fuss with her skirt.

Do you want {maid} with you today? As your maid... and as your lover.
Her face reddens to her neck, but she does not look away.

{maid} will be free after noon. During that time, would you...
She leaves the rest unsaid, gaze waiting near your hand.

{maid} is yours now. So... I want to stay with you more. Is that not allowed?
She regrets it at once and peeks at you through her fingers.
happy:
I am in such a good mood today. The reason... you should know, right?
She glances up, then looks away before you can answer.

You came. {maid} was just wondering when you would come find {maid}...
This time, she does not add that it was only for work.

Today is perfect for something happy. Like... you staying with {maid} a little longer. Is that okay?
She turns aside, leaving only one red ear facing you.
love:
Let us take today slowly. Anyway... {maid} only favors you.
She covers her face, then peeks through her fingers.

Even if we do nothing today, just staying with you would make {maid} very happy.
Two quiet seconds pass before her blush reaches her neck.

You can talk slowly. {maid} likes listening to you. And likes...
The words "when you speak only to {maid}" stay caught in her throat.

depressed:
{player}... hug {maid}, please.
She walks over and buries her face in your chest, holding your clothes tightly.

{maid} is not doing well today... but when you are here, {maid} already feels like she is getting better.
Her voice is muffled in your arms. "Hold me a little longer. Just a little."
general:
I feel so-so today. Spoil {maid} a little.
She rests her forehead on your shoulder and simply leans there.

There is nothing I especially want to do... so {maid} will follow you. Whatever you do, {maid} will watch beside you.
She laughs quietly at how clingy it sounds, but still catches your sleeve.
normal:
Morning. {maid} was just thinking about you when you came over.
She laughs first, probably because she says it so often and still wants to every time.

Going out today? Then {maid} will come with you. Wait just a second.
She hurries to get ready, then looks back halfway to make sure you are still there.

We just woke up... but seeing you still makes me want to say welcome home.
She tilts her head by the door, then grows shy at her own words.
happy:
I feel especially happy today! Maybe because I thought of you before I even got up.
She covers her mouth, ears red. Even after marriage, she still blushes at such words.

What do you want to do today? {maid} wants to do all of it with you. Even lazing around... should we be lazy together?
Her eyes shine as if proposing something very important.
love:
{player}... {maid} has been thinking of you since waking up. You are right beside me, and I still miss you.
She hides her face in your shoulder. "Do not laugh."

Let us spend today slowly. {maid} is not going anywhere. {maid} is here, beside you.
Even after all this time, saying it still makes her heart race.

Every morning when {maid} opens her eyes and sees you, she gets secretly happy for a moment before getting up.
Her fingers draw circles in your palm, voice shrinking smaller and smaller.

dating:
You finally came... {maid} thought she would have to wait alone until night again.
Her tone is light, but her fingers have already caught her hem.

{player} seems so busy lately. {maid} knows she should not be selfish, but... I still want to see you.
She glances up, then lowers her eyes again.

I am not blaming you. It is just that when I see you come over, {maid} suddenly feels... safe again.
She exhales softly, as if letting go of words held too long.
marriage:
Welcome home, {player}. {maid} waited for you a long time... I am not blaming you. I just wanted to say it once.
She smiles gently, eyes clingier than usual.

Please do not hurry away today, okay? {maid} wants to slowly make up for all the words we missed.
She takes your hand lightly, but does not let go.

The house gets a little too quiet without you.
She says it plainly, yet comes closer faster than usual.
low_mood:
...So {player} still remembers to come find {maid}.
She is not truly angry; her voice is just lower than usual.

Do not cover it with jokes today, okay? {maid} wants to hear you say something seriously.
There is no blame in her eyes, only a little hurt she cannot hide.

{maid} is a little sad today. Could you... stay with me first?
She falls quiet after saying it, as if waiting for you to come closer.

warm:
Eh? What does this... mean?
She stiffens for a moment. She does not dodge, but her ears are already red.

I am not a child. But... if you think this is appropriate...
Her voice grows smaller as her fingers tighten and loosen at her skirt.
close:
Y-you are doing it again... {maid} cannot stay calm like this.
Her shoulders shrink, but she does not move away.

It is not that I dislike it. {maid} just does not know where to look.
Her eyes land on your sleeve, ears burning.
dating:
You want to pat me again, don’t you? Honestly...
She says that, but her head is already lowered.

{maid} likes it. So... be gentle, okay?
Only after saying it does she realize how honest she was.
marriage:
Mm... head pats again today? {maid} is ready.
She obediently lowers her head, eyes narrowing under your hand.

A little longer. You are the one who made {maid} this spoiled.
She smiles with her eyes closed and rubs lightly against your palm.

close:
Eh? W-wait... {maid} is not ready yet.
Her hands freeze in the air. She stiffens, but does not step back.

Isn’t this too close... no, {maid} does not mean it like that. Do not misunderstand.
Her breathing has already gone unsteady.
dating:
Can you hold me a little longer today? Just...
The rest never comes out. She hides her face in your arms.

When you hold {maid}, {maid} really wants to be lazy.
Her forehead leans in, her voice softening word by word.
marriage:
Mm... this is the best.
She nestles into you, finds a comfortable spot, and stays there.

Do not move yet. {maid} has not had enough.
Her arms tighten behind your back, face rubbing lightly against your chest.

dating:
...{maid} almost could not stand just now.
She hides her face in her hands, ears red through the gaps.

Y-you could have warned me first...
Her lips move, but she still cannot quite speak properly.
marriage:
...Every time. {maid} is already married, and her heart still races like this.
She touches her chest, glances up, then looks away with a smile.

After kissing me, you are not allowed to run. Hold me a little longer.
She is already tugging your sleeve and leaning softly into you.

...Do not keep looking at {maid} right after that.
She turns her face aside at once, but her fingers still stubbornly cling to your sleeve.

Even now, a kiss like that still leaves {maid} flustered.
She tries to act composed, yet the blush has already climbed all the way to the tips of her ears.

release_hug:
Eh... already letting go?
Her hand remains on your arm for a moment, eyes a little reluctant.

Fine. Then you have to make it up next time. {maid} will remember.
Her fingers slide from your clothes and tap the back of your hand like a mark.
low_comfort:
Please do not ask why yet.
Her hands are folded before her, voice much lower than usual.

It is enough that you are here.
She does not look up, but her breathing slowly steadies.

flatter_praise:
Wait, wait. Why are you so good at praising me today... stop already!
She fans her face with both hands, ears red, eyes shining.

If you keep praising me, {maid} will really believe it. Will you take responsibility?
She tries to stop you, but cannot hide her smile.
flatter_gift:
That face says, ‘next time for sure,’ doesn’t it?
She tilts her head, holding back a laugh.

It is okay. Gifts can wait. As long as you remember {maid}.
Her voice is soft; she lowers her head and smiles.
communication_crank:
Eh? Turn the crank? W-what do you take {maid} for...
She puffs her cheeks at you, but her eyes are full of laughter.

I can go, but when I come back, you must cheer {maid} up properly.
She tries to look stern, but her mouth curves first.
